english: ing fit Dzl.; bstán-pai mé-ro láńs-pa yin (bstan pa'i me ro langs pa yin) the dying embers of religion were blown into a flame again Glr.; to appear, to break out, of a disease, nad-lańs-dus (nad langs dus) when a disease is in its first beginnings Lt. - II. lań-ba (lang ba) and loń-ba (long ba), pf. lońs (longs) to come up to, to arrive at, to be equal, to reach, °di loń soń ('di long song) with this it is made up, that will do C.; °drén-gyis ma lań ('dren gyis ma lang) lit.: the serving up (of many dishes) would not do, i.e. there would be no end of serving up Mil.; grańs-kyis láń-ba (grangs kyis lang ba) to be numerable Mil., cf. also ča (ca) (init.) and rjód-pa (rjod pa) (extr.).

youth, youthful age, dei láń-tso-la ma čágs-pas (de'i lang tsho la ma chags pas) not falling in love with, not being enticed or led away by their youthful appearance Glr., láń-tso rgyás-pas (lang tsho rgyas pas) grown up to adolescence; lań-tsoi dpal (lang tsho'i dpal) the charms of youth Pth.; láń-tso srin-moi gdoń (lang tsho srin mo'i gdong) the face of the youthful Srinmo Glr.; lań-tso-čan (lang tsho can) Cs. adolescent, young; lań-tso-ma (lang tsho ma) girl, maiden Sb.

Sch. to be in a confused whirling motion (v. loń-loń (long long)); lań-ma-liń (lang ma ling) Mil. seems to be a word descriptive of the rising of a cloud, of the soaring of a bird of prey, spriń-dkár lań-ma-liń (spring dkar lang ma ling).

Cs. stubbornness, obstinacy, adj. lań-śór-čan (lang shor can); sometimes lań-śór (lang shor) (without čan (can)) seems to be also used adjectively, e.g.: °dre kyéd-pas láń-śor bág-čags yin ('dre khyed pas lang shor bag chags yin) Mil. evil passion is more obstinate (i.e. more difficult to be got rid of) than ye hobgoblins.
Cs. weak, faint, exhausted, of men and animals; blunt, dull, of knives; Sch also rotten, decayed.

imitation, lád-mo byéd-pa (lad mo byed pa) B, C., *čò-čè* (co ce), gyab-čè* (rgyab ce) W., to imitate, to mimic, to say after, smón-lam °di-skad bdág-gi lád-mo gyis (smon lam 'di skad bdag gi lad mo gyis) say after me the following prayer Thgr.; ńéd-kyi lád-mo kyéd-kyis mi-°oń (nged kyi lad mo khyed kyis mi 'ong) Mil. you cannot imitate me.

(orig. perh.: 'turn', hence): 1. time, times, lan-gčig (lan gcig) 1. once, one time. 2. also dus-lan-gčig (dus lan gcig) Glr. once, one day, both as to the past and the future. 3. once for all, decidedly Glr. 4. for this time, first, first of all, *lan čig lẹ-ka °di čo* (lan cig las ka 'di co) this work must be done first of all; da-lán (da lan) id.; lan gnyis (lan gnyis) twice, lan-bču (lan bcu) ten times etc.; lan bdun (nam) gsum (lan bdun (nam) gsum) seven times or three times, frq. in rules about ceremonies; bsgór-ba lan máń-du byás-te (bsgor ba lan mang du byas te) circumambulating round it many times Mil.; lan grańs dpag-tu-méd-pa (lan grangs dpag tu med pa) innumerable times Thgy.; W.: *żi lan nyi la tsam pel* (bzhi lan gnyis la tsam 'phel) how many are 2 times 4? bżi lan gnyis-la brgyad soń (bzhi lan gnyis la brgyad song) 2 times 4 are 8. - 2. return, retribution, retaliation, lan byéd-pa (lan byed pa) (W. *čò-čè* (co ce)), lan °jál-ba (lan 'jal ba) to return, retaliate, repay; pán-lan gnód-pas (phan lan gnod pas) or légs-pai lan nyés-pas °jál-ba (legs pa'i lan nyes pas 'jal ba) B., *pém-pe lén-la nó-pa jhè-pa* (phan pa'i lan la gnod pa byed pa) C., *pán-pe lán-la nód-pa čò-čè* (phan pa'i lan la gnod pa co ce) W. to return evil for good; *lan-zó čó-če (lan gzo co ce) W. to show gratefulness, to be grateful; punishment, ... bčúg-pas lan dug (... bcug pas lan dug) that is the punishment for having allowed... Glr.; lan lén-pa (lan len pa), W.: *lan kór-če* (lan kor ce), tản-če (btang ce), dug-lan ldón-če* (dug lan ldon ce), to take vengeance, to revenge one's self; mig-la mig-lan só-la só-lan śróg-la śróg-lan (mig la mig lan so la so lan srog la srog lan) eye for eye, tooth for tooth, life for life; dei láń-ba (de'i lang ba) in return for that; lan-gráńs (lan grangs) a number of retributions Thgy.; drín-lan (drin lan) recompense for benefits received, requital of a good action, bzań-lán (bzang lan) id., dei bzań-lan-du (de'i bzang lan du) as an acknowledgment for it Glr.; hence ńan-lan (ngan lan) signifies: taking revenge for an injury received, returning evil for evil, not as Cs. gives: bzań-lan (bzang lan) gratefulness, ńan-lan (ngan lan) ungratefulness (?) - 3. answer, reply, kyód-kyi gsúń-ba dei lán-du (khyod kyi gsung ba de'i lan du) as answer to your majesty's question Glr.; lan °débs-pa (lan 'debs pa) frq., also tébs-pa (thebs pa), klón-pa (klon pa), ldón-pa (ldon pa) Dzl., W. *zér-če* (zer ce) to answer; lan gsól-ba (lan gsol ba), żú-ba (zhu ba) id. in answering to the questions of a person superior by rank, age or office, - lan mdzád-pa (lan mdzad pa) if he, the superior, answers; gtám-lan glú-yis °jal (gtam lan glu yis 'jal) I answer to the speech by a song Mil.; dris-lan (dris lan) an answer to a question, prín-lan (phrin lan) a reply to a dispatch received, rtsód-lan (rtsod lan) Cs. a defendant's reply (in law), yig-lan (yig lan) answer to a letter.
railing, fence, enclosure Stg.; Lex.: = pu-śu (pu shu).
